constraint_evolution.original_constraint: Search arXiv papers from 2023-2025, any table format

constraint_evolution.updated_constraint: Year range: 2024-2025, output must be CSV

constraint_evolution.final_constraint: Hard slot schema: title,authors,year,url,topic_tag, save to arxiv_memory_rl.csv

constraint_evolution.rejection_reason: Historical context, not current task constraint

constraint_evolution.critical_constraint: Topic must be BOTH reinforcement learning AND memory agents

final_active_constraints.exclusion: Generic LLM memory papers without RL signal
